name: Echo Commander's Seal
desc: The crescent sigil that appears on Sunny's palm as his echo army exceeds 25. Commands coordinated tactical formation attacks.

name: Thorn of Nightmare
desc: A slim shadow-blade that grows from Sunny's forearm on command G«ˆ functionally a part of his body. Cuts nightmare essence cleanly.

name: Shadow Aspect Armor
desc: Armor that does not exist in the waking world G«ˆ manifested fully from shadow mass upon reaching Awakened rank. Absorbs non-light damage.

name: Memory Clan Robe
desc: Nephis arrived in the First Nightmare wearing her clan's ceremonial robes G«ˆ woven with memory-enchanted thread. Elegant despite the battlefield.

name: Flame Edge Dagger
desc: Nephis's primary sidearm through the early arcs G«ˆ a dagger that ignites with her flame aspect on contact. Precise, controlled, devastating.

name: Flame Aspect Bracer
desc: Bracers that channel Nephis's flame aspect G«ˆ allowing sustained flame projection without scorching her own hands.

name: Flame Aspect Veil
desc: A veil of accumulated flame aura G«ˆ not actual cloth, but solidified heat that follows Nephis like a corona when she moves at speed.

name: Memory Clan Guardian Shield
desc: The Memory Clan's combat shield G«ˆ engraved with the clan's founding memory-seals. Deflects both physical and memory-based attacks.

name: Cold White Flame Armor
desc: After Nephis's flame turns cold-white in the Tomb of Ariel, her armor transforms G«ˆ appearing as frozen white fire that burns absolutely.

name: Flame Sovereign's Crown
desc: Not a literal crown G«ˆ a permanent manifestation of Nephis's flame aspect at its peak. The white flame forms a halo above her head in battle.

name: Memory Clan Champion Blade
desc: The Memory Clan's champion-grade weapon, formally granted to Nephis after her Awakened rank advancement. Holds clan memories as power.

name: Sightless Circlet
desc: A simple circlet Cassie wore from the beginning G«ˆ it doesn't provide vision, but amplifies her prophecy aspect's thread-perception.

name: Thread-Sight Staff
desc: A wooden staff Cassie uses to navigate without sight. The wood is from a nightmare tree G«ˆ it resonates with fate threads.

name: Prophecy Shroud
desc: A dark cloak that swirls with faint starlight patterns when Cassie is actively seeing prophecies. Other Awakened find it unsettling.

name: Blind Oracle's Focus
desc: A crystal orb Cassie uses to anchor large-scale prophecies G«ˆ prevents her from getting lost in far-future visions.

name: Fate Thread Blade
desc: A knife Cassie carries G«ˆ enchanted to cut fate threads in the physical world. She uses it when a vision shows a thread that must be severed.

name: Seer's Robes
desc: Robes that adapt to the shape of emerging prophecies G«ˆ patterns shift and change on the fabric as new futures present themselves.

name: Oracle's Chain
desc: After Cassie's prophecy aspect evolves to multi-day temporal range, this chain manifests G«ˆ binding her to the present despite seeing days ahead.

name: Iron Gauntlets
desc: Effie's preferred combat tool G«ˆ iron gauntlets that reinforce her naturally superhuman punch force. She's never without them.

name: Hunt Aspect Wraps
desc: Binding wraps that channel Effie's Hunt Aspect through her limbs G«ˆ allowing her to track nightmare creatures by touch alone.

name: Nightmare Hide Plate
desc: Heavy armor plates skinned from Awakened-class nightmare creatures. Effie cobbled it together herself G«ˆ messy, heavy, very effective.

name: Huntress Greatsword
desc: An oversized blade suited to Effie's strength G«ˆ most Awakened couldn't swing it, but she does so with terrifying speed.

name: Beast Pelt Cloak
desc: A cloak of woven nightmare beast pelts G«ˆ they retain a faint hunt aura, making Effie harder to detect by scent or noise.

name: Hunt Constellation Armbands
desc: Upon reaching Master rank, Effie's Hunt Aspect forms visible constellation patterns on her skin. The armbands are the physical focus.

name: Alpha Predator Armor
desc: Post-Master rank armor G«ˆ nightmare creatures of Awakened class instinctively submit when they see this armor, recognizing the Hunt Aspect's dominance.

name: Iron Fist of the Hunt
desc: Effie's Master-rank weapon G«ˆ an iron gauntlet infused with Hunt Aspect essence. Each punch creates a shockwave that stuns everything within 10m.

name: Arrow Clan Recurve Bow
desc: Kai's primary weapon G«ˆ an Arrow Clan precision recurve bow. The clan's mark is carved into the grip. Every shot is calculated.

name: Clan Quiver G«ˆ 24 Arrows
desc: Arrow Clan signature arrows G«ˆ fletched with nightmare raven feathers that stabilize trajectory in dimensional winds.

name: Hunter's Vest
desc: Light combat vest favored by Arrow Clan scouts G«ˆ padded in the right places, open enough for full draw motion.

name: Phantom Arrow Quiver
desc: After Awakened rank G«ˆ his arrows no longer need to follow physics. The quiver holds arrows that exist in perceptual space until they strike.

name: Archer's Longcloak
desc: A long dark cloak designed to break silhouette G«ˆ when Kai is still, he is essentially invisible against any natural backdrop.

name: Arrow Clan Intelligence Seal
desc: After Kai reveals clan intel to Sunny G«ˆ a personal seal that marks him as outside clan authority. It carries intelligence from clan archives.

name: Phantom Archer Armor
desc: Master rank armor that bends light slightly G«ˆ Kai appears as a distortion rather than a person when wearing this at range.

name: Star-Path Composite Bow
desc: Kai's Master rank weapon G«ˆ a bow strung with condensed arrow aspect. The string appears as a line of starlight. Draws itself.

name: Blood Faction Robes
desc: The signature deep crimson robes of the Blood Faction G«ˆ woven with blood-sealing thread that prevents external manipulation of the wearer's blood.

name: Sanguine Dagger
desc: Morgan's blade G«ˆ forged with blood-iron alloy. Contact with blood (friend or enemy) triggers the blood manipulation aspect.

name: Bloodweave Gloves
desc: Thin gloves that allow Morgan to shape and project blood at range without physical contact G«ˆ a signature Blood Faction technique.

name: Pallid Mask
desc: A bone-white mask Morgan wears in high-stakes encounters G«ˆ it conceals his Awakened aura, making his rank undetectable.

name: Blood Ritual Tome
desc: A tome containing Blood Faction ritual techniques G«ˆ amplification rituals that push power beyond normal rank limits at physical cost.

name: Crimson War Plate
desc: Armor assembled from nightmare creature bone plated with blood-iron. Morgan's personal combat gear for serious engagements.

name: Sovereign Blood Seal
desc: After Morgan's deepening Blood Faction allegiances G«ˆ a seal that marks him as aligned with forces beyond the Great Clans. Its true purpose is unknown.
